inputs.label: Number of Guests
inputs.businessContext: Expected total number of attendees for the event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected total number of attendees for the event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkinlik için beklenen toplam katılımcı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Gesamtzahl der Teilnehmer der Veranstaltung.

inputs.label: Cost per Plate
inputs.businessContext: Direct food and beverage cost per guest, including ingredients and preparation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct food and beverage cost per guest, including ingredients and preparation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Misafir başına malzemeler ve hazırlık dahil doğrudan yiyecek ve içecek maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Lebensmittel- und Getränkekosten pro Gast, einschließlich Zutaten und Zubereitung.

inputs.label: Service Staff
inputs.businessContext: Number of waitstaff and service personnel required.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of waitstaff and service personnel required.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerekli garson ve servis personeli sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der benötigten Kellner und Servicekräfte.

inputs.label: Staff Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage per service staff, including benefits and taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage per service staff, including benefits and taxes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan haklar ve vergiler dahil servis personeli başına saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stundenlohn pro Servicekraft, inklusive Sozialleistungen und Steuern.

inputs.label: Event Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the event from setup to teardown.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the event from setup to teardown.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kurulumdan söküme kadar etkinliğin toplam süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtdauer der Veranstaltung von Aufbau bis Abbau.

inputs.label: Fixed Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Fixed costs such as equipment rental, insurance, permits, and transportation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed costs such as equipment rental, insurance, permits, and transportation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipman kiralama, sigorta, izinler ve nakliye gibi sabit maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fixe Kosten wie Gerätemiete, Versicherung, Genehmigungen und Transport.

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired markup percentage on total cost to ensure profitability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired markup percentage on total cost to ensure profitability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kârlılığı sağlamak için toplam maliyet üzerinde istenen kar marjı yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschter Aufschlagsprozentsatz auf die Gesamtkosten zur Sicherstellung der Rentabilität.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax or VAT percentage on the subtotal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax or VAT percentage on the subtotal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ara toplam üzerinde geçerli satış vergisi veya KDV yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Umsatzsteuer- oder Mehrwertsteuersatz auf den Zwischensumme.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
